steps.title: Spot the defining claim
steps.content: The second clause reveals what the blank must describe: “we will never be able to answer it”—meaning the question is unanswerable.

steps.title: Match the word to that requirement
steps.content: Irresolvable directly names an unanswerable question. The other three describe different properties: self-contradictory involves internal conflict, imperative involves urgency, and unavoidable involves inescapability—none matching the impossibility of resolution. This matches choice A—A is correct.
